user_query: I need to gather some information about a historical esports game. Fetch the game data using the game ID, and provide details about the teams and players involved. Additionally, draw some cards from a regular 52-card playing deck to add a fun element to the gathering.

TaskList.description: Fetch the game data using the game ID to gather information about the historical esports game.
Provide details about the teams and players involved in the fetched game data.
Draw some cards from a regular 52-card playing deck for an added fun element.
